summary: Completed testing of Archive Evaluations and Delete All Attempts features. Backend functionality fully working (96.2% success rate). Frontend login integration issue prevents full UI testing.

ui_bugs.issue: Login form not submitting properly - credentials filled but login doesn't proceed

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form not properly calling backend auth API despite API working correctly

passed_tests: Backend: List evaluations with archived filter (?archived=true/false)
Backend: Admin-only access control for archive/delete operations
Backend: Health check and authentication endpoints
Code Review: Archive page component with amber styling
Code Review: Dropdown menu UI refactoring with proper data-testid attributes
Code Review: Archive navigation in sidebar
Code Review: Restore button functionality in archived evaluations
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend login form integration - the login API works correctly when called directly (curl test successful), but the frontend form is not properly submitting credentials. Check JavaScript form submission, event handlers, and network requests in browser dev tools.
